special_mechanics.name: Item Throwing
special_mechanics.description: Flicky can pick up items (telephones, flower pots, cups, bottles) by walking into them and throw them by jumping to defeat enemies

special_mechanics.name: Chirp Following
special_mechanics.description: Small birds (Chirps) follow Flicky in a chain formation and disperse if the chain contacts an enemy

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative data only. Wikipedia source documents gameplay mechanics and design philosophy but contains no quantitative physics parameters (speeds, accelerations, gravity values). The game features basic platforming with side-to-side running and jumping on a single wraparound screen with 48 levels.
